CustomField.description: Used in formula field to calculate min date between this field and Account CES Survey Send Date field.
CustomField.formula: IF( AND( ISBLANK(Billing_Primary_Contact__r.CES_Survey_Send_Date__c), ISBLANK(SaaS_Primary_Contact__r.CES_Survey_Send_Date__c) ), NULL, IF( AND( ISBLANK(Billing_Primary_Contact__r.CES_Survey_Send_Date__c), NOT(ISBLANK(SaaS_Primary_Contact__r.CES_Survey_Send_Date__c)) ), SaaS_Primary_Contact__r.CES_Survey_Send_Date__c, IF( AND( ISBLANK(SaaS_Primary_Contact__r.CES_Survey_Send_Date__c), NOT(ISBLANK(Billing_Primary_Contact__r.CES_Survey_Send_Date__c)) ), Billing_Primary_Contact__r.CES_Survey_Send_Date__c, DATE(1900, 01, 01) + MIN( BLANKVALUE(Billing_Primary_Contact__r.CES_Survey_Send_Date__c, DATE(1900, 01, 01)) - DATE(1900, 01, 01), BLANKVALUE(SaaS_Primary_Contact__r.CES_Survey_Send_Date__c, DATE(1900, 01, 01)) - DATE(1900, 01, 01) ) )))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: First time the CES Survey was sent to the SaaS or Billing Primary Contact related to the CF.
CustomField.label: CES Survey 1st Sent to Primary Contacts
